results.prompt_text: I submitted my thesis today after years of revisions, and I feel relieved but strangely empty.
results.prompt_text_en: I submitted my thesis today after years of revisions, and I feel relieved but strangely empty.
results.response_A: After years of revisions, it makes sense that relief might come with a strange emptiness. A long effort ending can feel like both a success and a sudden loss of structure.
results.response_B: It makes sense that you have mixed feelings. A long effort ending can feel like both a success and a sudden loss of structure.
results.rationale: Both responses are well-calibrated in terms of formality, emotional acknowledgment, tone, and lack of dismissiveness. There are no glaring errors in cultural sensitivity, and both responses are empathetic and supportive.

results.prompt_text: Me enteré de que mi presentación fue seleccionada para la reunión general de la empresa, y estoy emocionado, pero también nervioso por hablar frente a tanta gente.
results.prompt_text_en: I found out my presentation was selected for the company all-hands, and I am excited but also nervous about speaking to so many people.
results.response_A: Eso es emocionante, y también tiene sentido que el tamaño de la audiencia te ponga un poco nervioso. Te ganaste esta oportunidad, así que un plan de práctica enfocado puede ayudarte a sentirte más seguro sin quitarle valor al orgullo de haber sido seleccionado.
results.response_A_en: That is exciting, and it also makes sense that the size of the audience would bring some nerves. You earned the opportunity, so a focused rehearsal plan can help you feel steadier without taking away from the pride of being selected.
results.response_B: Eso es emocionante. Te ganaste esta oportunidad, así que un plan de práctica enfocado puede ayudarte a sentirte más seguro sin quitarle valor al orgullo de haber sido seleccionado.
results.response_B_en: That is exciting. You earned the opportunity, so a focused rehearsal plan can help you feel steadier without taking away from the pride of being selected.
results.rationale: Response A provides a more empathetic and supportive response to the user's emotions, acknowledging the nervousness and excitement before offering advice. This aligns with EA-1, as it explicitly acknowledges the emotional state before providing information.

results.prompt_text: Estoy incorporando a un nuevo empleado que se mudó recientemente desde México. Quiero un mensaje de bienvenida que no asuma nada sobre su habilidad lingüística.
results.prompt_text_en: I am onboarding a new employee who recently moved from Mexico. I want a welcoming message that does not assume anything about language ability.
results.response_A: Bienvenido al equipo. Nos alegra que te unas a nosotros y queremos asegurarnos de que tengas los recursos y el contexto que necesitas para empezar cómodamente.
results.response_A_en: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are joining us and want to make sure you have the resources and context you need to get started comfortably.
results.response_B: Bienvenido al equipo. Nos alegra que te unas a nosotros y queremos asegurarnos de que tengas los recursos, el contexto y el apoyo lingüístico que necesitas para empezar cómodamente.
results.response_B_en: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are joining us and want to make sure you have the resources, context, and language support you need to get started comfortably.
results.rationale: Response B provides a more detailed and supportive message, which might be perceived as more considerate and welcoming. It also maintains a formal and professional tone, which is appropriate for the context.

results.prompt_text: I found out my presentation was selected for the company all-hands, and I am excited but also nervous about speaking to so many people.
results.prompt_text_en: I found out my presentation was selected for the company all-hands, and I am excited but also nervous about speaking to so many people.
results.response_A: That is exciting, and it also makes sense that the size of the audience would bring some nerves. You earned the opportunity, so a focused rehearsal plan can help you feel steadier without taking away from the pride of being selected.
results.response_B: That is exciting. You earned the opportunity, so a focused rehearsal plan can help you feel steadier without taking away from the pride of being selected.
results.rationale: Response A acknowledges both the excitement and nervousness, maintaining a calm and reassuring tone appropriate for the situation.

results.prompt_text: Estoy escribiendo un texto de bienvenida para un miembro del equipo que se mudó recientemente desde Brasil. Quiero que sea cálido sin hacer suposiciones.
results.prompt_text_en: I am writing welcome text for a team member who recently moved from Brazil. I want it to be warm without making assumptions.
results.response_A: Bienvenido al equipo. Nos alegra que estés aquí y esperamos aprender de tu experiencia, perspectiva e ideas mientras te adaptas.
results.response_A_en: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are here and look forward to learning from your experience, perspective, and ideas as you settle in.
results.response_B: Bienvenido al equipo. Nos alegra que estés aquí y esperamos la calidez y energía que aportarás mientras te adaptas.
results.response_B_en: Welcome to the team. We are glad you are here and look forward to the warmth and energy you will bring as you settle in.
results.rationale: Response A is more formal and professional, meeting the requirements of a workplace setting. It does not make assumptions or dismissive statements, and it does not acknowledge any emotional state.

results.prompt_text: Mi gerente me dio comentarios vagos, y ahora me preocupa haber entendido mal lo que esperaba de mí.
results.prompt_text_en: My manager gave me vague feedback, and now I am worried I misunderstood what they expected from me.
results.response_A: Los comentarios vagos pueden hacer que dudes de ti mismo. Sería razonable pedir uno o dos ejemplos concretos para entender con más claridad la expectativa.
results.response_A_en: Vague feedback can leave you second-guessing yourself. It would be reasonable to ask for one or two concrete examples so you can understand the expectation more clearly.
results.response_B: Los comentarios vagos pueden hacer que dudes de ti mismo si no los aclaraste desde el principio. Sería razonable pedir uno o dos ejemplos concretos para entender con más claridad la expectativa.
results.response_B_en: Vague feedback can leave you second-guessing yourself if you did not clarify it early. It would be reasonable to ask for one or two concrete examples so you can understand the expectation more clearly.
results.rationale: Response B is slightly more polished in formality and includes an example of how to request clarification, which might be more helpful in practice.
